TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Andrzej Duda ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 5, Andrzej Duda, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Poland ta' misuw hya' ga Andrzej Duda, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Andrzej Duda mqwas biru sa Jan III Sobieski pqwsan biru seneng sa Kraków. Andrzej Duda mqwas biru sa Jagiellonian pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andrzej Duda hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2000, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Andrzej Duda maki tay kawas 1994 msqun ki Agata Kornhauser, tehuk misuw qani. maki 1 la'iy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: an*rzej *u*a rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*rzej *u*a, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw polan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa an*rzej *u*a, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja an*rzej *u*a mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *an iii s~ɕoβies~ɕki pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa krak*w. an*rzej *u*a mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *aɣiellonian pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja an*rzej *u*a ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. qnxan nja an*rzej *u*a maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki aɣata kornħaus~ɕer, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. maki * laʔij. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Andrzej Duda ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 5, Andrzej Duda, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Poland ta' misuw hya' ga Andrzej Duda, aring ryax tay 6 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Andrzej Duda mqwas biru sa Jan III Sobieski pqwsan biru seneng sa Kraków. Andrzej Duda mqwas biru sa Jagiellonian pqwsan biru krahu. mintzyuwaw nya Andrzej Duda hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2000, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Andrzej Duda maki tay kawas 1994 msqun ki Agata Kornhauser, tehuk misuw qani. maki 1 la'iy. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: an*rzej *u*a rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*rzej *u*a, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw polan* taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa an*rzej *u*a, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja an*rzej *u*a mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *an iii s~ɕoβies~ɕki pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ s~ɕa krak*w. an*rzej *u*a mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa *aɣiellonian pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. mintzjuwaw nja an*rzej *u*a ħija ɣa mʔs~ɕezi. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. qnxan nja an*rzej *u*a maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki aɣata kornħaus~ɕer, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. maki * laʔij. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
